name: Commercial Loan Origination (21-node stress test)
description: Underwrite, approve, and book a commercial loan: borrower and business intake, KYC, financial diligence, collateral, risk rating, credit memo, approval, closing, and funding. Identity, entity, and computed values cascade through every downstream form.

forms.name: Borrower Profile
forms.description: Principal borrower / guarantor identity and contact.

forms.name: Business Profile
forms.description: Operating entity, EIN, structure, industry.

forms.name: Personal Financial Statement
forms.description: Guarantor assets, liabilities, contingent obligations; identity carries forward.

forms.name: Tax Returns — Personal
forms.description: Three-year personal 1040 summary; identity carries forward.

forms.name: Tax Returns — Business
forms.description: Three-year business return summary; entity carries forward.

forms.name: Business Financials
forms.description: Year-to-date P&L and balance sheet; entity carries forward.

forms.name: Bank Statements
forms.description: Trailing twelve-month operating account activity; entity carries forward.

forms.name: KYC / OFAC Check
forms.description: Identity verification and sanctions screening; borrower and entity carry forward.

forms.name: Credit Bureau Report
forms.description: Consumer and commercial credit pull; subject and entity carry forward.

forms.name: Collateral Description
forms.description: Asset class, location, and ownership of pledged collateral.

forms.name: Collateral Appraisal
forms.description: Independent valuation of pledged collateral; collateral details carry forward.

forms.name: UCC Lien Search
forms.description: Existing UCC filings and prior lien position; entity and collateral carry forward.

forms.name: Insurance Verification
forms.description: Hazard, liability, and lender-loss-payee endorsements; collateral details carry forward.

forms.name: Cash Flow Analysis
forms.description: Normalized operating cash flow from financials, tax returns, and bank activity.

forms.name: Debt Service Coverage
forms.description: Coverage ratio computed against existing and proposed debt; cash flow and PFS values carry forward.

forms.name: Risk Rating
forms.description: Composite risk rating; credit, DSCR, and tax inputs carry forward.

forms.name: Loan Terms
forms.description: Proposed structure, pricing, and covenants; risk and appraisal carry forward.

forms.name: Credit Memo
forms.description: Underwriter narrative summarizing the package for committee; terms, UCC, and insurance carry forward.

forms.name: Approval Decision
forms.description: Committee outcome and conditions; memo content carries forward.

forms.name: Closing Package
forms.description: Note, security agreement, and ancillary closing documents; identity and approved amount carry forward.

forms.name: Funding & Booking
forms.description: Disbursement instructions and core banking booking; closing values and approver carry forward.
